description: In 2023, the Australian Public Service Commission engaged in complex negotiations with the Community and Public Sector Union (CPSU) regarding a standardized 'right to work from home' for federal employees.

key_events.description: Negotiations stall over the 'right to disconnect' and remote work flexibility.
Union organizes national day of action supporting remote work access.
Government signals willingness to include flexibility in new enterprise bargaining agreement.
Historic deal signed securing flexible work options for 160,000 workers.

calibration_notes: Represents a successful labor outcome in a formal collective bargaining context.
